hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" | grep -q '\.md$'; then if command -v markdownlint-cli2 >/dev/null 2>&1; then markdownlint-cli2 --fix "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; elif command -v markdownlint >/dev/null 2>&1; then markdownlint --fix "$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi; true

changed=$( { git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null; git diff --name-only --cached 2>/dev/null; git log --diff-filter=ACMR --name-only --pretty=format: --since="4 hours ago" 2>/dev/null; } | sort -u | wc -l | tr -d ' '); if [ "$changed" -gt 3 ]; then echo "💡 Session touched $changed files — consider /harness retro to capture learnings"; fi
